repository.name: move-anything-waveform-editor
repository.description: Waveform Editor tool for Move Everything - trim, gain adjust, normalize, and edit WAV files on the Ableton Move

commit.message:
Refactor DSP to stereo, fix drum preset export, and misc improvements

- Refactor DSP from mono int16 to interleaved stereo int16 (L,R,L,R,...)
- Mono WAV files duplicated to both channels on load
- Support PCM 16-bit, PCM 24-bit, and IEEE float 32-bit input
- WAV output always stereo 16-bit PCM
- Waveform display and zero-crossing use L channel
- Fix DSP export symbol: plugin_init -> move_plugin_init_v2
- Fix build.sh to copy from src/dsp/dsp.so (Docker output path)
- Fix drum preset sampleUri: URL-encode spaces (%20)
- Default auto slice threshold from 5 to 25
- Disable loop playback in slice mode, restore on exit
- Back from record-ready state exits module entirely

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix recording race condition and improve recorded file handling

- Add "stopping" state to poll sampler finalization before loading WAV,
  preventing "No waveform data" error from async stop
- Show "SAVING..." screen while waiting for WAV to finalize
- Track recorded files as unsaved (dirty) with discard-on-exit cleanup
- Add timestamp to edit filenames (sample_edit_0306_1423.wav)
- Clean up recording UI header (remove debug VU display)
- Add dirty param support to DSP plugin

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remap knobs: E4=vertical scale, E5=gain/threshold, E7/E8=twist actions

- E3: zoom only (removed shift+E3 vertical scale)

commit.message:
fix: start save interval when video is already playing on init

If the video was already playing when the content script initializes
(common due to retry delays and YouTube's SPA auto-play), the play/
loadedmetadata events won't fire again, leaving the interval unset.
Check paused state after attaching listeners and start immediately if needed.

commit.message:
Implement Google OAuth login for admin panel

- GET /api/admin/auth/google → redirects to Google consent screen
- GET /api/admin/auth/google/callback → exchanges code, verifies email
  against ADMIN_EMAILS, upserts admin_users row, sets JWT cookie
- GET /api/admin/auth/me → returns current user from JWT cookie
- POST /api/admin/auth/logout → clears auth cookie

Denied emails get a Hebrew 403 page. JWT valid for 7 days.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix manual order display and form UX

- Remove supplier_name override on email_used (supplier shows only in ประเภท column)
- ชื่อเกม column: show per-row instead of idx===0 only
- hasCost: exclude orders containing manual/email items (prevent rowSpan conflict)
- จำนวน/เครดิต: show cost for manual items in per-row mode
- ประเภท column: per-row (remove rowSpan) so each item shows own badge/supplier
- Manual modal: replace game_name text input with category dropdown + อื่นๆ option
- Remove credits field from manual form (keep only cost)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Improve fleet orchestration feel: windowed command pulse + 0× speed

- TempoSystem: replace one-shot pulse with a timed window model.
  When the pulse fires, a window opens for kWindowDuration (6s/3.5s/2s
  by band). Any number of ships can be ordered freely during the window.
  After the window closes, the next window opens after the full cycle.
  First order of the game starts the first timed window; subsequent
  orders within the same window are no-ops (don't advance the clock).
  Band changes still open a window immediately.

- BattleState: add commandWindowEnd field (default = double.infinity
  so the game starts with ordering fully open).

- KinematicSystem: replace binary stop/brake with proportional speed
  cap. Ships now approach targets using safeSpeed = sqrt(2*a*d*0.8),
  easing in smoothly instead of rushing then slamming brakes.

- HudOverlay: add 0× to time scale selector (tactical planning mode —
  freezes battle simulation without the pause-menu overlay).

- Tests: update advanceCommandPulse test to reflect new windowed semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: claude-bot
repository.description: Claude Code Telegram Bot

commit.message:
fix(orchestrator): 修复 goal task check-in 重复触发问题

review 失败后将 task 打回 running 并调用 sendCheckIn，但未更新
checkInCounts / lastCheckInAt，导致 scanner 冷却状态失效，在
task.dispatchedAt 超过 10 分钟后立即重复触发 check-in。

修复：将 tracking 更新移入 sendCheckIn 内部，任何调用方均自动维护
冷却状态；同时新增 claudeClient.isRunning() 检查作为双重保险，
防止 session 状态滞后时误触发。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Batch text downloads in remote verify, fix extra file false positives

  for text files during remote verify (149 files → 1 subprocess).
- Filter .gitignore/.gitattributes from extra-files check — they exist

- Fix path normalization: use toPosix instead of normalise throughout
  remote verify to prevent / vs \ mismatches on Windows.
- Add time remaining to remote verify progress.

commit.message:
fix: update npm to latest in release workflow for OIDC publishing support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix scanner stuck in hold after upload; skip empty trunked system slots

Two fixes:
- After EPG, send KEY,S to put scanner into scan mode. Without this the
  scanner sits on whatever channel it last touched during programming and
  appears frozen (no scanning).
- Skip trunked systems (Motorola, EDACS, P25, LTR) entirely instead of
  creating an empty CSY/SIN slot with no trunk frequencies. An empty trunked
  system slot confuses the scanner's scan sequence; logging makes it clear
  why the system was skipped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix: remove MAC table from hub config

Hubs are Layer 1 devices and don't learn MAC addresses.
Only switches (Layer 2) should show the MAC Table tab and
participate in MAC learning during ping/traceroute.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Enhance bot creation and agent tool functionality with tests (#52)

* fix: Add Content-Type header to the bot creation request in the demo web test.

* feat: improve agent tool usage and response quality

- Add tool selection guide and usage scenarios to information_gatherer
  prompts and docstrings; instruct agent to return empty list for simple
  messages that don't need external info
- Preserve newlines in search results passed to response_generator
  (removes .replace('\n', ' ') that was flattening structured data)
- Add response length calibration: short replies for simple messages,
  conditional multi-perspective for opinionated topics only
- Simplify EvaluationFeedback enum: merge PLAN_AGAIN/EXECUTE_AGAIN into
  REGATHER to reduce LLM decision complexity
- Expand evaluator rubric with concrete format checklist
- Skip gather_information for simple short messages (ㅋㅋ, ㄱㅅ, etc.)
  via regex pattern matching in routing
- Accumulate information_gathering_results across retry loops instead of
  overwriting; pass prior evaluation feedback to retry prompts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: clarify financial_data_lookup supports stocks/indices/ETFs only

Remove coin and currency (환율) from supported inputs; update tool
docstring and selection guide to note that crypto/FX should use
naver_search instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* perf+test: share httpx client, parallelize Naver search, add adapter tests

Performance:
- Inject shared httpx.AsyncClient via Dishka (Scope.APP) into all
  adapters; eliminates per-call TCP connection setup overhead
- NaverSearch: replace sequential for-loop with asyncio.gather() for
  parallel sim+date dual requests
- LlamaCppGemmaEmbedder: replace blocking sync httpx.get() in __init__
  with async lazy initialization via _get_model()
- FinanceSearchClient: replace @cached(TTLCache) with asyncio.Lock-based
  async-safe manual cache; also remove coin/FX from autoComplete target

Testing:
- Mark existing external API tests with @pytest.mark.external; configure
  pytest to exclude them by default (addopts = "-m not external")
- Add mock-based unit tests for NaverSearchClient (4 cases) and
  FinanceSearchClient (8 cases) using pytest-httpx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: spec-driven integration tests replacing mock-based tests

Protocol 인터페이스를 스펙으로 삼아 실제 연동 기반 테스트로 전면 전환.

- test/contracts/: NaverSearch, FinanceSearch, WebDocumentFetch, TextEmbedder,
  BotRepository, MemoryRepository, MessageRepository 계약 테스트 (실제 API/DB)
- test/specs/: 도메인 모델 불변 조건, 그래프 라우팅 로직, 코드 실행 도구,
  메모리 관리 그래프, API 엔드포인트 통합 테스트
- conftest.py: 개별 서비스 fixture 및 테스트 데이터 팩토리 추가
- pyproject.toml: pytest-cov 추가, external 마커 제거
- ci-develop.yml: NAVER_CLIENT_ID/SECRET 환경변수 추가
- 기존 mock 기반 테스트 파일 전부 삭제

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* style: Consolidate multiline function arguments and calls to single lines for improved readability.

* fix: resolve all test failures

- llamacpp_gemma_embedder: short-circuit for empty input list (server returns 500)
- new_message graph: set status="completed" in finalize_response node
- test_api_endpoints: replace TestClient with async httpx+ASGITransport to avoid anyio event loop conflict
- settings: add HTTP_SSL_VERIFY option for environments with SSL proxy issues
- container: pass HTTP_SSL_VERIFY to httpx client; add certifi dependency
- conftest: set HTTP_SSL_VERIFY=False in test settings; remove TestClient fixture
- test_message_repository: fix idempotent test to use proper anchor message
- test_web_document_fetch: use python.org instead of Wikipedia (403)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: resolve CI lint, format, and type check failures

- Fix E501 line too long in information_gatherer.py and response_generator.py
- Fix E501 line too long in test_message_repository.py
- Fix B905 zip() missing strict= in test_text_embedder.py
- Fix pyright return type in llamacpp_gemma_embedma_embedder._get_model
- Fix pyright async generator type annotation in test_api_endpoints.py
- Run ruff format on affected files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial release of Networx network emulator

Browser-based interactive network emulator for teaching GCSE/A Level
computer science networking (OCR J277 & H446). Built with React,
React Flow, Zustand, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

Features: device palette, wired/wireless edges, terminal commands
(ping, traceroute, nslookup, curl, ssh, etc.), hostname resolution,
switch MAC table learning, router/firewall config, 5 preset scenarios,
JSON save/load, GitHub Pages deployment.
